prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical fantasy illustration of a grand Gothic cathedral interior dominated by a towering arched stained-glass window. The stained glass depicts an elegant anime-style holy maiden or battle princess, a saintly axe-wielding maiden, standing full-body in the center and holding an ornate long poleaxe diagonally across her body. She wears a delicate white and pale blue dress with translucent layered sleeves, gold filigree trim, floral embroidery, a dark corset bodice, pearl-like accessories, and a halo-like wreath of pale flowers around her head. Her face is intentionally covered by a flat opaque beige square censor block centered over the facial area. The window is filled with intricate lead came patterns and luminous glass textures: exactly 5 large floral medallion motifs near the upper arch, many white and cream blossoms with teal leaves around the figure, gold ornamental borders, blue accents, cracked translucent glass, and bright sunlight glowing through. Surround the window with realistic dark stone cathedral architecture, ribbed arch molding, carved columns, and warm side shadows. Add exactly 2 symmetrical flower arrangements in gold vases on pedestals near the lower left and lower right edges. The polished stone floor reflects the stained-glass colors in shimmering patches of blue, gold, and white. Use ultra-detailed anime stained glass mixed with realistic cathedral photography, dramatic backlighting, warm sacred atmosphere, sharp ornate linework, complex transparent glass texture, high contrast, no visible text, no watermark.
